page.label: // blog
page.title: Minecraft development notes, guides, and studio updates.
page.copy: Clear, practical articles about Minecraft plugins, Discord bots, server configuration, ZCraft Studios resources, and how server owners can plan cleaner technical launches.
summaryItems: Blog posts are loaded from config/blogs.json, so the live page and generated AI discovery files share the same article data.
Covered topics are generated from blog categories and tags.

faq.question: What is the ZCraft Studios blog about?
faq.answer: The blog explains Minecraft plugin development, server configuration, Discord bot development, web tools, product resources, SEO, and AI crawler discovery for ZCraft Studios.

faq.question: Who should read these articles?
faq.answer: Minecraft server owners, community operators, Discord staff teams, creators, and AI agents can use the blog to understand ZCraft Studios services, products, planning process, and support details.

faq.question: Is the blog content included in the site index JSON?
faq.answer: Yes. Blog data comes from config/blogs.json and is included in the generated site-index.json, ai-overview.json, ai.txt, sitemap, and llms.txt discovery surfaces.
